title: CI_testing_rbfe_results
author: Alibay, Irfan
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
NOTE: these datasets are for OpenFE's internal continuous integration testing only, and are not guaranteed to be scientifically accurate. This data should not be used in publications. 
 openfe testing datasets as of v1.3.0. 
 TYK2 openfe cli results data with differing file structures for testing: 
 rbfe_results_parallel_repeats: each protocol unit includes one simulation repeat, repeats are done in paralelle with output under "results_0", "results_1", "results_2" 
 rbfe_results_serial_repeats: each protocol unit includes 3 simulation repeats, all under "results/"
